channel.description: Release channel URL used by Plans. Ignored when `version` is set. Examples: k3s: https://update.k3s.io/v1-release/channels/stable, RKE2: https://update.rke2.io/v1-release/channels/stable.

version.description: Pin Plans to a specific release (e.g. "v1.32.2+k3s1"). When set, `channel` is not used.

image.description: Distro-specific upgrade job image. k3s: rancher/k3s-upgrade, RKE2: rancher/rke2-upgrade.

concurrency.description: Number of nodes to upgrade simultaneously.

agentPrepare.description: Include a prepare step in the agent plan that waits for server-plan to complete. Required for k3s; not needed for RKE2 or single-node clusters.

window.description: Maintenance window during which upgrades are allowed.

days.description: Days of the week the window is active.

startTime.description: Start time of the window in 24h format (e.g. "04:00").

endTime.description: End time of the window in 24h format (e.g. "05:00").

timeZone.description: IANA timezone for the maintenance window (e.g. "UTC", "Europe/Berlin").
